description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden bookcase with a rich reddish-brown finish, featuring six evenly spaced horizontal shelves including the base. The sides are straight and vertical, with the top shelf slightly recessed between the uprights. The back is open, allowing visibility through the shelves, and the construction appears sturdy with thick wooden panels. The grain of the wood is visible, giving it a natural and warm appearance. There are no visible doors, drawers, or decorative elements, emphasizing a functional and minimalist design. The bookcase is empty, with no books or objects placed on its shelves.
description: A tall, narrow wooden bookcase with six open shelves and a warm reddish-brown finish, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six open shelves and the vertical side panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat wooden panel with no visible shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open back and shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid wooden panel.
